MODULE: cosmos.core.nlp.entity_extractor
FILE: cosmos/core/nlp/entity_extractor.py (203 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Entity Extractor for Natural Language Commands.

Extracts structured entities (files, URLs, amounts, etc.) from text.

CLASSES:
- ExtractedEntities: Extracted entities from text.
- EntityExtractor: Extract structured entities from natural language text.

Handles:
- URLs and fil
  Methods: def extract(self, text: str) -> ExtractedEntities
  Methods: def get_primary_token(self, entities: ExtractedEntities) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def get_primary_chain(self, entities: ExtractedEntities) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def get_primary_amount(self, entities: ExtractedEntities) -> Optional[dict]
